items.title: [正面] 玩了两天，体验下来的感觉就是很像手游《重返未来：1999》，这俩画风和背景设定都很像，but1999...
items.summary: 玩了两天，体验下来的感觉就是很像手游《重返未来：1999》，这俩画风和背景设定都很像，but1999是更立体点就是了，我没尬黑啊俩我都玩，我感觉还行，很喜欢游戏作战中也有主人公的一部分，让我感觉自己真的参与进来了这场战斗而不是只是最为“指挥官”的角色，其他的就觉得平平无奇，很适合摸鱼玩

items.title: [正面] I skipped through the story every time. It's not b...
items.summary:
I skipped through the story every time. It's not boring, I just want to play Slay the Spire. 

Game has been fun with the art bringing so much of the world alive. The aspects of each character-type is unique and refreshing. There is hate for the ai generated translations, but so far (outside the story) I haven't experience anything that took away from the game. 

It's free, but is a gacha. Recommend NOT spending points and doing your best for free to play. 

Definitely give the game a try! Hopefully they will flourish and build off of the archetypes they have now.
